# Trendify

> Trendify is a Saudi digital growth partner offering web development, brand identity, smart marketing, and AI-powered tools for entrepreneurs and startups.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Trendify's growth services and smart tools.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how we partner with founders.
- [Services](/services): Web development, brand identity, marketing, AI solutions.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Selected client projects and case studies.
- [Tools](/tools): Smart tools that power our delivery.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on digital growth, marketing, and AI.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Trendify team.
